# Sunil Prakash

## Profile
Enterprise AI and platform architecture leader. Building durable technology capability in regulated environments.

## Current Role
Vice President, Cloud & Platform Architecture, Deutsche Bank (2021–present)

## Focus Areas
- Enterprise AI strategy and operating models
- Data platform architecture (Data Vault 2.0, dbt, BigQuery)
- AI governance and regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, SR 11-7, BCBS 239)
- Cloud platform modernization in banking
- Cross-functional execution across engineering, product, and risk

## Career
- Deutsche Bank: Cloud & platform architecture, enterprise data foundations, regulatory-grade data platforms
- Halialabs: AI/ML platform architecture, NLP and deep learning productionization
- Cognizant: Enterprise architecture and delivery governance

## Education
- PGPMAX (Executive MBA), Indian School of Business
- M.Tech, Enterprise Business Analytics, National University of Singapore
- B.E., Computer Science, RGTU, India
- Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect

## Writing
- Why Most Enterprise AI Programs Fail Before They Start — https://sunilprakash.com/writing/why-enterprise-ai-programs-fail/
- Data Vault 2.0 in Banking — https://sunilprakash.com/writing/data-vault-in-banking/
- The AI Center of Excellence Is Dead — https://sunilprakash.com/writing/ai-operating-model/
